settings.custom_liquid:
{%- liquid assign handle = collection.handle assign starting_price = 999999 for p in collection.products if p.price_min < starting_price assign starting_price = p.price_min endif endfor # Category-aware hero theme: which family is this collection part of assign storage_family = 'storage-units,shoe-racks,wardrobes,bookshelves,chest-of-drawers,bar-cabinets,sideboards,storage-bins,filing-cabinets,dressers,nightstands,vanities,outdoor-storage,pantry-cabinets,towel-racks,garment-racks,desk-organizer,kitchen-cabinets,3-drawer-chests,4-drawer-chests,5-drawer-chests,6-drawer-chests' | split: ',' assign dining_family = 'dining-kitchen,4-seater-dining-sets,6-seater-dining-sets' | split: ',' assign tv_family = 'tv-entertainment-units' | split: ',' assign study_family = 'work-study' | split: ',' assign beds_family = 'beds' | split: ',' assign theme = 'generic' if dining_family contains handle assign theme = 'dining' elsif tv_family contains handle assign theme = 'tv' elsif study_family contains handle assign theme = 'study' elsif beds_family contains handle assign theme = 'beds' elsif storage_family contains handle assign theme = 'storage' endif -%} {%- case theme -%} {%- when 'tv' -%} {%- assign hero_bg = '#152420' -%} {%- assign hero_tag_color = '#f4a51c' -%} {%- assign hero_title_color = '#F0E0C4' -%} {%- assign hero_sub_color = '#9AC0A0' -%} {%- when 'dining' -%} {%- assign hero_bg = '#2A1F14' -%} {%- assign hero_tag_color = '#C4A06A' -%} {%- assign hero_title_color = '#F0E0C4' -%} {%- assign hero_sub_color = '#9A7C54' -%} {%- else -%} {%- assign hero_bg = '#F0ECE4' -%} {%- assign hero_tag_color = '#8A6E4A' -%} {%- assign hero_title_color = '#152420' -%} {%- assign hero_sub_color = '#5a5a5a' -%} {%- endcase -%}
Home › {{ collection.title }}

{%- liquid assign show_pills = false case theme when 'storage' if handle == 'chest-of-drawers' or handle == '3-drawer-chests' or handle == '4-drawer-chests' or handle == '5-drawer-chests' or handle == '6-drawer-chests' assign pill_handles = 'chest-of-drawers,3-drawer-chests,4-drawer-chests,5-drawer-chests,6-drawer-chests' | split: ',' assign pill_labels = 'All Chests,3-Drawer,4-Drawer,5-Drawer,6-Drawer' | split: ',' else assign pill_handles = 'storage-units,shoe-racks,wardrobes,bookshelves,chest-of-drawers,sideboards,bar-cabinets' | split: ',' assign pill_labels = 'All Storage,Shoe Racks,Wardrobes,Bookshelves,Chest of Drawers,Sideboards,Bar Cabinets' | split: ',' endif assign show_pills = true when 'dining' assign pill_handles = 'dining-kitchen,4-seater-dining-sets,6-seater-dining-sets' | split: ',' assign pill_labels = 'All Dining,4-Seater Sets,6-Seater Sets' | split: ',' assign show_pills = true when 'study' assign pill_handles = 'work-study,bookshelves' | split: ',' assign pill_labels = 'All Study,Bookshelves' | split: ',' assign show_pills = true endcase -%} {%- if show_pills -%}
Browse by type
{%- for h in pill_handles -%} {%- assign pc = collections[h] -%} {%- if pc and pc.products_count > 0 -%} {%- assign is_active = false -%} {%- if h == handle -%}{%- assign is_active = true -%}{%- endif -%} {{ pill_labels[forloop.index0] }} ({{ pc.products_count }}) {%- endif -%} {%- endfor -%}
{%- endif -%} {%- liquid assign show_guide = true case theme when 'dining' assign g1q = 'How many seats do I need?' assign g1a = '4-seater fits a 10x10 ft dining room. 6-seater needs at least 10x12 ft for comfortable movement.' assign g2q = 'Faux marble vs solid wood?' assign g2a = 'Marble top looks premium and wipes clean easily. Solid wood feels warmer and is lighter to move.' assign g3q = 'Is assembly included?' assign g3a = 'Yes - free professional installation on every order, usually same day or next day.' when 'tv' assign g1q = 'What width TV unit do I need?' assign g1a = 'For a 43 inch TV, pick a unit at least 90-120 cm wide. For 55 inch+, go 130-150 cm+.' assign g2q = 'Cable management?' assign g2a = 'Furniva TV units are built with open/closed compartments to route cables and hide set-top boxes.' assign g3q = 'Setup included?' assign g3a = 'Free professional installation on every order - same day or next day.' when 'study' assign g1q = 'Desk or bookshelf first?' assign g1a = 'Start with the desk for your main workspace, then add a bookshelf once you know your remaining wall space.' assign g2q = 'How much storage do I need?' assign g2a = 'A 3-4 shelf bookcase comfortably holds 60-80 books plus files and decor.' assign g3q = 'Is assembly included?' assign g3a = 'Yes - free professional installation on every order.' when 'beds' assign g1q = 'Is a mattress included?' assign g1a = 'Mattresses are sold separately unless the product page says otherwise - check standard Indian mattress sizes before ordering.' assign g2q = 'How much weight can a bunk bed hold?' assign g2a = 'Our bunk beds are built with solid oak wood or engineered wood frames rated for both kids and adults on the lower bunk.' assign g3q = 'Is assembly included?' assign g3a = 'Yes - free professional installation on every order, usually same day or next day.' when 'storage' case handle when 'wardrobes' assign g1q = 'How much clothing can a wardrobe hold?' assign g1a = 'A 2-door wardrobe with a hanging rod comfortably fits 15-20 hanging garments plus folded items on the shelves.' assign g2q = 'Engineered wood vs solid wood?' assign g2a = 'Engineered wood is lighter, affordable, and resists humidity well - ideal for most Indian homes.' assign g3q = 'Is assembly included?' assign g3a = 'Yes - free professional installation on every order, usually same day or next day.' when 'bookshelves' assign g1q = 'How many books can a bookshelf hold?' assign g1a = 'A 3-4 shelf bookcase comfortably holds 60-80 books plus decor and files.' assign g2q = 'Open shelving vs closed cabinet?' assign g2a = 'Open shelves are easier to access daily; closed cabinet doors keep dust off less-used items.' assign g3q = 'Is assembly included?' assign g3a = 'Yes - free professional installation on every order, usually same day or next day.' when 'chest-of-drawers', '3-drawer-chests', '4-drawer-chests', '5-drawer-chests', '6-drawer-chests' assign g1q = 'How many drawers do I need?' assign g1a = '4-drawer chests suit a single bedroom; 5-6 drawers work well for a shared or master bedroom.' assign g2q = 'Engineered wood vs solid wood?' assign g2a = 'Engineered wood is lighter, affordable, and resists humidity well - ideal for most Indian homes.' assign g3q = 'Is assembly included?' assign g3a = 'Yes - free professional installation on every order, usually same day or next day.' when 'sideboards', 'bar-cabinets' assign g1q = 'Where should I place this?' assign g1a = 'Sideboards and bar cabinets work best along a dining or living room wall, ideally near where you entertain guests.' assign g2q = 'How much storage is inside?' assign g2a = 'Most of our sideboards and bar cabinets include a mix of open display shelves and closed cabinet storage.' assign g3q = 'Is assembly included?' assign g3a = 'Yes - free professional installation on every order, usually same day or next day.' else assign g1q = 'How much can a shoe rack hold?' assign g1a = 'Our compact racks fit 10-20 pairs; tall utility cabinets fit up to 40 pairs.' assign g2q = 'Engineered wood vs solid wood?' assign g2a = 'Engineered wood is lighter, affordable, and resists humidity well - ideal for most Indian homes.' assign g3q = 'Is assembly included?' assign g3a = 'Yes - free professional installation on every order, usually same day or next day.' endcase else assign show_guide = false endcase -%} {%- if show_guide -%}

{%- endif -%}

{%- liquid assign handle = collection.handle assign storage_family = 'storage-units,shoe-racks,wardrobes,bookshelves,chest-of-drawers,bar-cabinets,sideboards,storage-bins,filing-cabinets,dressers,nightstands,vanities,outdoor-storage,pantry-cabinets,towel-racks,garment-racks,desk-organizer,kitchen-cabinets' | split: ',' assign dining_family = 'dining-kitchen,4-seater-dining-sets,6-seater-dining-sets' | split: ',' assign tv_family = 'tv-entertainment-units' | split: ',' assign study_family = 'work-study' | split: ',' assign beds_family = 'beds' | split: ',' assign theme = 'storage' if dining_family contains handle assign theme = 'dining' elsif tv_family contains handle assign theme = 'tv' elsif study_family contains handle assign theme = 'study' elsif beds_family contains handle assign theme = 'beds' endif case theme when 'dining' assign explore_handles = 'storage-units,beds' | split: ',' assign explore_labels = 'Storage Units,Beds' | split: ',' when 'tv' assign explore_handles = 'storage-units,dining-kitchen' | split: ',' assign explore_labels = 'Storage Units,Dining & Kitchen' | split: ',' when 'study' assign explore_handles = 'storage-units,tv-entertainment-units' | split: ',' assign explore_labels = 'Storage Units,TV Units' | split: ',' when 'beds' assign explore_handles = 'dining-kitchen,storage-units' | split: ',' assign explore_labels = 'Dining and Kitchen,Storage Units' | split: ',' else assign explore_handles = 'work-study,dining-kitchen' | split: ',' assign explore_labels = 'Study,Dining & Kitchen' | split: ',' endcase -%}
